raw.subject: Your Visalia page caught my eye, Double D Towing Service
raw.body:
Hi,

I love that you highlight your 24/7 availability on your Facebook page - it's great to see such clear communication about your towing services! It makes me think of all the customers who might appreciate knowing they can count on you anytime.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls from people who would prefer to explore your services online.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a services menu, a work gallery to showcase your team in action, and a prominent booking CTA so customers can easily schedule their appointments.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/double-d-towing-service-visalia

If you're curious about turning this idea into a simple, flat fee project for local businesses like yours, I'd be happy to discuss details over a quick call or reply to this email and we can take it from there.
